acceptance_criteria.text: Schemas carry an optional provenance enum (concrete/provisional/inferred), default concrete, on work items, acceptance criteria, and evidence runs.
L2 enforces: admission (provisional/inferred items are valid), completion-requires-concrete (P2), and consistency (a concrete item may not rest on non-concrete evidence) (P3).
adopt emits provisional/inferred records (trilemma escape: Closed + Faithful); doctor ratchets provisional -> concrete as real evidence arrives; tests cover admission/ratchet/consistency.
